receiptGuide.title: Do you have the receipt digitally?
receiptGuide.intro: Many apps store receipts — export as PDF or image and upload here.
receiptGuide.step1: Open the app where the receipt is (e.g. Kivra, bank, email, Wallet)
receiptGuide.step2: Open the receipt → Save, Share or Download as PDF or image
receiptGuide.step3: Come back here and choose Select from files
receiptGuide.examplesAria: Examples of apps with digital receipts
receiptGuide.kivraStep1: Open Kivra and find the receipt under purchases or documents.
receiptGuide.kivraStep2: Tap the receipt and choose share or save — often as PDF.
receiptGuide.kivraStep3: Save the PDF and choose the file here — no need to convert it to a screenshot.

shopping.title: Shopping
shopping.subtitle: Shared shopping list with smart suggestions from your pantry
shopping.intro: Shared list for the household. Everyone with edit access can update it.
shopping.smartFillIntro: AI suggests items based on stock, expiry dates and meal plans — and adds them straight to your list.
shopping.preferencesPlaceholder: E.g. vegetarian, budget, gluten-free, family with kids
shopping.fillSuccess: {count} {count, plural, one {item added} other {items added}} to the list.
shopping.fillPartialSuccess: {added} {added, plural, one {item added} other {items added}}. {skipped} already on the list.
shopping.fillAllDuplicates: All {count} suggestions were already on the list.

planer.title: Plans
planer.subtitle: Plan meals in the calendar and add ChatGPT ideas
planer.ideasIntro: Generated ideas from your stock. Pick a date and add to the calendar.
planer.ideasEmpty: No generated ideas yet. Use the Recipe ideas button first.
planer.gridAria: Calendar grid, swipe left or right to change month
planer.recipeIdeasAria: Open recipe ideas — generate meal suggestions from your stock

stats.title: How your pantry looks

profile.cropHint: Drag to reposition. Zoom if needed.

admin.subtitle: Manage users and overview
admin.logoutConfirmRequired: Type confirmation to log out everyone.
admin.loggedOutAll: All users have been logged out ({count} sessions).
admin.errorLogsNote: Recent server errors (max 200 entries / 7 days). Passwords and tokens are never stored.
admin.logoutAllNote: Log out everyone ends every active session, including your own. Users must log in again.

invite.loginPrompt: Log in with account {email} to accept the invitation.
invite.wrongAccount: You are logged in as {current}, but the invitation is for {expected}. Log in with the correct account.
invite.loginRedirectMessage: Log in with the same email address the invitation was sent to.

photoScan.subtitle: AI reads the label and fills in details
photoScan.readFailed: Could not read the product from the image. Try a clearer photo.
photoScan.networkError: Network error while analysing the image.
photoScan.filledFromPhoto: Filled in details from the photo (confidence: {confidence}). Check before saving.
photoScan.pickHint: Take a clear photo of the product label and we'll fill in name, quantity and unit for you.

receipt.readingStatus: Reading receipt… this usually takes a few seconds.
receipt.parseFailed: Oops — could not read the receipt. Try a clearer file or another angle.
receipt.networkError: Oops — network error. Check your connection and try again.

formats.hint: Supported: PDF, JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC — e.g. Kivra PDF or a photo of a paper receipt.
formats.unsupported: That file type won't work here. Choose a PDF or image (JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC).
formats.tooLarge: The file is too large (max 8 MB). Try a smaller PDF or photo.
formats.processingFailed: Could not prepare the image. Try another file or photograph the receipt.

receiptBulk.lead: Have the receipt in an app? Upload the PDF or image directly — or photograph a paper receipt. We suggest items you can add.

scanFlow.lookupFailed: Oops — could not look up the barcode. Try again or enter manually.
scanFlow.networkError: Oops — network error. Check your connection and try again.
scanFlow.noCamera: No camera found on this device.
scanFlow.cameraDenied: Could not open the camera. Allow camera access in your browser settings.
scanFlow.toastAdded: Done! "{label}" is now in your pantry.
scanFlow.toastAddedUnknown: Nice — "{label}" is in your pantry (unknown barcode).
scanFlow.invalidBarcodeManual: Oops — enter a valid barcode (at least 8 digits).
scanFlow.productNotFoundBanner: Product not found in database. Check the name before saving.
scanFlow.scannerHint: Point the camera at the product barcode.

recipe.title: Recipe suggestions
recipe.notLoggedIn: You must be logged in to generate recipes.
recipe.serviceUnavailable: AI service is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
recipe.generateFailed: Oops — could not generate recipes right now. Try again.
recipe.noneGenerated: No recipes were generated. Add more items and try again.
recipe.reachFailed: Could not reach the AI service right now. Try again in a moment.
recipe.parseFailed: Could not parse recipe suggestions. Try again in a moment.
recipe.parseFromAi: Could not parse recipe suggestions from AI. Try again in a moment.
recipe.noInventoryNote: No items in stock yet. Add items first, then you can generate recipes.
recipe.networkError: Network error while generating recipes. Check your connection and try again.
recipe.intro: Get meal ideas from your current stock. Add preferences like "quick dinner" or "vegetarian".
recipe.label: Recipe ideas

onboarding.welcomeBody: Keep track of what you have at home — fridge, freezer and cupboard. See what is expiring soon and avoid duplicate purchases.
onboarding.scanBody: Scan barcodes with the camera to add items in seconds. Find the scan button at the bottom on mobile.
onboarding.locationsBody: Split your stock by where items are stored. Tap a location on the home screen to view and edit contents.
onboarding.shareBody: Invite family or housemates under Settings. Switch between households via the menu at the top if you have several pantries.
onboarding.readyBody: Start by scanning a few items or adding manually. The guide is shown once — you can always open it again under Settings.

expiring.title: Expiring soon
expiring.subtitle: Within {days} days
expiring.empty: Nothing expires in the next {days} days — nice work!

captcha.failed: Captcha was not verified. Try again.
captcha.notConfigured: Captcha is not configured. Contact the administrator.

shoppingItem.title: Remove row?
shoppingItem.description: Row {name} will be removed from the shopping list.

clearChecked.title: Clear checked?
clearChecked.description: {count} checked {count, plural, one {row will} other {rows will}} be permanently removed.
clearChecked.descriptionAll: All checked rows will be permanently removed.

inventoryItem.title: Delete item?
inventoryItem.description: Item {name} will be removed from the pantry.

inventoryItemFinished.title: Mark as finished?
inventoryItemFinished.description: Item {name} will be removed from the active list but can be shown under "Show finished".

householdMember.title: Remove member?
householdMember.description: Member {name} will lose access to the household.
householdMember.consequence: They must be invited again to return.

household.title: Delete household
household.description: This cannot be undone. All inventory, shopping list and consumption history for the household will be deleted.
household.otherMembers: {count} {count, plural, one {other member} other {other members}} will lose access immediately.
household.typedHintGeneric: Type the household name or DELETE to confirm.

invite.title: Revoke invitation?
invite.description: Invitation to {name} will be removed. The link will stop working.
invite.descriptionGeneric: The invitation will be removed and the link will stop working.

pet.title: Delete pet?
pet.description: Pet {name} and related food logs will be deleted.

petFood.title: Delete food?
petFood.description: Food entry {name} will be removed from pet supplies.

plannedMeal.title: Delete meal?
plannedMeal.description: Meal {name} will be removed from the weekly plan.

receiptReview.title: Discard review?
receiptReview.description: {count} identified {count, plural, one {item will disappear} other {items will disappear}} if you choose a new image.
receiptReview.descriptionEmpty: The parsed receipt list will be lost if you choose a new image.
receiptReview.consequence: You will need to photograph or select the receipt again.

generic.title: Delete?
generic.descriptionSimple: Are you sure you want to delete this?
generic.descriptionPermanent: The selected entry will be permanently deleted.

household.forbidden: Only owners can perform this action.
household.deleteConfirm: Confirmation does not match. Type the household name or DELETE.
household.alreadyMember: User is already a member of the household.
household.pendingInvite: There is already a pending invitation to this email address.
household.lastOwner: There must be at least one owner in the household.
household.inviteEmailMismatch: Log in with the same email address the invitation was sent to.
household.notMember: You are not a member of this pantry.

validation.deleteConfirm: Type the household name or DELETE to confirm

api.suggestionsFailed: Could not create shopping suggestions from the AI response. Try again.
api.insightsEmpty: You have no items registered yet.
api.insightsSummary: Here are your latest inventory tips.
api.insightsParse: Could not parse AI response. Try again in a moment.
api.insightsAddItems: Add items in fridge, freezer or cupboard to get smart tips.
api.productImageParse: Could not parse product details from the image. Try a clearer label.
api.receiptUnsupported: Unsupported file type. Use PDF or an image (JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC).
api.receiptPdfScanned: This PDF looks like a scan without readable text. Upload a screenshot or photograph the receipt instead.
api.receiptPdfExtractFailed: Could not read the PDF. Try downloading it again or upload an image instead.
api.receiptParseStatus: Could not read the receipt ({status}). Try a clearer file.
api.receiptAiFailed: Could not parse the AI response.
api.receiptNoItems: No items found on the receipt. Try a sharper photo, another PDF, or another angle.
